title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
